rows.description: Grey foul Sch. to Mr Kinder 1838
rows.notes: Overrode both extractors. Visually confirmed description 'Grey foul Sch. to Mr Kinder 1838' from `gemini-flash`. The amounts on the ledger are '22 20 0'. `gpt-5-mini` extracted this directly, but '20 shillings' violates the hard rule (shillings >= 20). `gemini-flash` incorrectly processed this to '1 0 0' ignoring the '22' pounds. Applied the hard rule conversion: 22 pounds + (20 shillings converted to 1 pound) = 23 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence.

extractor_discrepancies.gpt-5-mini: One row was effectively missed due to combining 'Subscriptions viz' (header) with the first entry, resulting in 43 rows instead of the observed 44. Significant misalignment and misinterpretation of column values (e.g., shillings vs pence, pounds vs shillings) were observed in many rows from Row 8 onwards.
